description: Temporal TTA configuration for SHIFT dataset evaluation

params._kappa_trans_doc: Transition concentration: higher = prototypes change more slowly between frames. Paper default: 50-100
params._kappa_ems_doc: Emission concentration: higher = tighter clusters. Paper default: 10-50
params._window_size_doc: Sliding window size for EM. Paper uses 5-10
params._em_iterations_doc: EM iterations per frame. Paper uses 3-5
params._tau_update_doc: Minimum confidence to include detection in SSM update
params._tau_predict_doc: Minimum confidence threshold for final predictions
params._fusion_mode_doc: How to fuse VLM and prototype predictions: 'entropy' (uncertainty-weighted), 'weighted' (fixed weight), 'prototype_only', 'vlm_only'
params._fusion_weight_doc: Weight for prototype predictions vs VLM predictions (not used if entropy fusion enabled)
